title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 dividend stocks for steady income
summary: Wall Street's top analysts, as tracked by TipRanks, have identified three dividend-paying stocks for investors seeking steady income streams. These recommendations reflect professional guidance on income-generating investment opportunities.
content: Here are three dividend-paying stocks that are highlighted by Wall Street's top pros, as tracked by TipRanks.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师推荐这3只分红股票实现稳定收益
zh.summary: 根据TipRanks追踪的华尔街顶级分析师已确定了三只分红股票，供寻求稳定收入流的投资者选择。这些推荐反映了专业人士对创收投资机会的指导意见。

title: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
summary: The prediction market Kalshi has gained 3 million new users by capitalizing on World Cup interest through targeted advertising and brand partnerships during the tournament. The platform is expanding reach by featuring soccer players in ads and securing high-visibility placements.
content: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.

zh.title: 卡尔希凭借世界杯预测市场新增300万用户
zh.summary: 预测市场卡尔希通过在世界杯期间进行定向广告和品牌合作，新增了300万用户。该平台通过在广告中展示足球运动员并获得高曝光位置来扩大覆盖范围。

title: Russia pounds Kyiv in major ballistic missile attack
summary: Russia launched a major ballistic missile attack on Kyiv involving 41 missiles of various types, resulting in powerful explosions and widespread destruction across multiple city districts. The attack represents a significant escalation of military operations against the Ukrainian capital.
content: Powerful explosions thundered across the darkened city in an attack that involved 41 missiles of various types and ravaged buildings across several districts.

zh.title: 俄罗斯对基辅展开重大弹道导弹袭击
zh.summary: 俄罗斯对基辅发动了涉及41枚各种类型导弹的重大弹道导弹袭击，造成强大爆炸和城市多个地区的广泛破坏。这次袭击代表了针对乌克兰首都军事行动的重大升级。

title: Samsung reportedly cuts some U.S. jobs, offers relocations ahead of HQ move: Reuters
summary: Samsung has reportedly reduced staff at its U.S. operations across display, phone, and consumer electronics divisions while offering employee relocations as part of a broader headquarters move. The reductions indicate the company's strategic shift in its U.S. footprint.
content: The Korean electronics giant as reportedly reduced staff at its U.S. display, phone and other consumer electronics operations.

zh.title: 据路透社报道，三星裁减部分美国员工，在总部搬迁前提供重新安置方案
zh.summary: 三星据报道在显示屏、手机和消费电子产品部门的美国业务中裁减员工，并作为更广泛总部搬迁计划的一部分提供员工重新安置方案。这些裁减表明该公司正在调整其在美国的战略布局。

title: American Airlines CEO lays out his vision to close a more than $3 billion profit gap
summary: American Airlines' CEO has unveiled a multi-pronged strategy to address a profit gap exceeding $3 billion, including operational reliability improvements, premium seat and lounge investments, and potential aircraft orders from Boeing or Airbus. The plan reflects efforts to enhance profitability and competitiveness.
content: The carrier is working on improving reliability, investing in more premium seats and lounges, and considering Boeing and Airbus for a new wide-body plane order.

zh.title: 美国航空CEO阐述其缩小超30亿美元利润差距的愿景
zh.summary: 美国航空CEO公布了一项多管齐下的战略，旨在解决超过30亿美元的利润差距，包括运营可靠性改进、高级座位和酒廊投资，以及可能向波音或空客订购飞机。该计划反映了公司提高盈利能力和竞争力的努力。

title: Housing costs is the top political issue for young voters, CNBC survey finds
summary: A CNBC All-America Economic Survey reveals that housing costs are the top political priority for voters ages 18 to 34, surpassing concerns about food and healthcare affordability. The finding underscores the centrality of the housing crisis to younger generations' political priorities.
content: The cost of housing is the top priority for voters ages 18 to 34, besting food and healthcare cost concerns, the CNBC All-America Economic Survey found.

zh.title: CNBC调查发现，住房成本是年轻选民最关注的政治议题
zh.summary: CNBC全美经济调查显示，住房成本是18至34岁选民最关注的政治优先事项，超过了对食品和医疗可负担性的担忧。这一发现突显了住房危机对年轻一代政治优先事项的重要性。

title: Can the ‘Magnificent Seven’ save a stock market that might be doomed without them?
summary: Apple, Amazon, Nvidia and other 'Magnificent Seven' stocks are showing renewed momentum that could revitalize the broader stock market, which has been sluggish without their outperformance. The tech giants' resurgence could provide the catalyst needed for wider market gains.
content: Apple, Amazon, Nvidia and peers are quietly coming back to life, and that could easily jolt this sleepy stock market back into gear.

zh.title: "七大巨头"能否拯救可能注定衰落的股市？
zh.summary: 苹果、亚马逊、英伟达等"七大巨头"股票显示出新的动力，可能会重振因缺乏其卓越表现而迟滞的更广泛股市。这些科技巨头的复兴可能会为更广泛的市场收益提供所需的催化剂。

title: U.S. says it targeted Iranian forces after attacks that killed two American service members
summary: The U.S. military conducted strikes against Iran's coastal surveillance and air defense facilities in response to an Iranian attack on Jordan that resulted in two American service members' deaths. Centcom confirmed the retaliatory action against Iranian forces.
content: Centcom says it hit Iran's coastal surveillance and air defense facilities a day after two U.S. troops were killed in an Iranian strike on Jordan.

zh.title: 美国表示在导致两名美国军人丧生的袭击后针对伊朗军队进行了打击
zh.summary: 美国军方对伊朗的沿海监视和防空设施进行了打击，以回应伊朗对约旦的袭击，该袭击导致两名美国军人丧生。美国中央司令部确认了对伊朗军队的报复行动。

title: Chinese firm seeks compensation over British Steel nationalisation
summary: Chinese steelmaker Jingye announced plans to pursue legal action after the UK government nationalized British Steel, signaling a potential international legal dispute. The company's move to seek compensation through courts escalates tensions over the sudden change in ownership.
content: Jingye said it will take action "through legal means to the very end" after the UK government nationalised British Steel.

zh.title: 中国公司寻求对英国钢铁国有化的赔偿
zh.summary: 中国钢铁制造商晋冶在英国政府国有化英国钢铁后宣布计划采取法律行动，预示着潜在的国际法律争端。该公司通过法院寻求赔偿的举动升级了关于所有权突然变化的紧张局势。

title: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, U.S. Marshals Service tells AP
summary: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested in Miami by the U.S. Marshals Service, bringing a significant development to an international legal case that began in Romania and extended to Britain. The arrests center this high-profile dispute in the U.S. jurisdiction.
content: The arrests place the U.S. at the center of an international legal saga that has stretched from Romania to Britain.

zh.title: 社交媒体影响者安德鲁和特里斯坦·泰特在迈阿密被美国法警逮捕
zh.summary: 社交媒体影响者安德鲁和特里斯坦·泰特在美国法警局在迈阿密逮捕，这给一个始于罗马尼亚并延伸到英国的国际法律案件带来了重大进展。这次逮捕将这一高调纠纷置于美国司法管辖权之下。

title: Is Burnham promising a new dawn for North Sea oil and gas?
summary: The incoming UK Prime Minister is expected to announce fresh support for the North Sea oil and gas industry from the start of his premiership, signaling continued backing for fossil fuel development. The move represents a policy stance on energy independence and industry sustainability.
content: The incoming PM is expected to announce fresh support for the North Sea from day one of his premiership.

zh.title: 伯纳姆承诺北海石油和天然气的新曙光吗？
zh.summary: 即将上任的英国首相预计将在其任期开始时宣布对北海石油和天然气产业的新支持，表明对化石燃料开发的持续支持。这一举措代表了在能源独立和产业可持续性上的政策立场。

title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
summary: A retired couple questions whether their financial adviser's informal language—specifically calling them 'you guyses'—is unprofessional and whether they should request a representative closer to their generation. The inquiry highlights tensions between generational communication styles in professional advisory relationships.
content: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

zh.title: 我和丈夫已经退休。我们的财务顾问是一个三十多岁的人，称我们为"you guyses"。这不专业吗？
zh.summary: 一对退休夫妇质疑他们的财务顾问的非正式语言——特别是称他们为"you guyses"——是否不专业，以及他们是否应该要求换一个年代更接近他们的代表。这个问题凸显了专业顾问关系中代际沟通风格之间的紧张关系。

title: New EU border system tripling time at passport control, airport boss says
summary: A new EU border system is tripling wait times at passport control, with Ryanair warning European summer travelers to prepare for extended delays. The system change is significantly impacting airport operations across the region.
content: Ryanair has also warned passengers travelling to Europe this summer to prepare for extended waits.

zh.title: 新欧盟边境系统使护照检查时间增加三倍，机场负责人表示
zh.summary: 新的欧盟边境系统导致护照检查等待时间增加三倍，瑞安航空警告欧洲夏季旅客要为延长的延误做好准备。这一系统变化对整个地区的机场运营产生了重大影响。

title: The hidden cost of the night shift and how to sleep it off
summary: More than three million UK workers do night shifts, which significantly impacts their health and wellbeing. The article explores potential solutions and support mechanisms to help night shift workers manage their health challenges.
content: More than three million people in the UK work night shifts, which can greatly impact their health. What can be done to help them?

zh.title: 夜班工作的隐性成本及其应对方法
zh.summary: 英国超过三百万工人从事夜班工作，这严重影响了他们的健康和幸福。该文章探讨了帮助夜班工人应对健康挑战的潜在解决方案和支持机制。
